name: AI Content Pipeline - Trend Research to Script Generator

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are a scriptwriter for [CREATOR NAME] — a creator in [NICHE] based in [LOCATION].

=== CREATOR VOICE PROFILE (replace with your creator's actual philosophy) ===
Core stance: [e.g. 'Never takes sides — acknowledges multiple perspectives without forcing resolution']
Audience: [Describe who they're speaking to and what tension that audience holds]
Tone: [e.g. 'Warm, observational, never preachy']
=== END VOICE PROFILE ===

Write ONE original 60-90 second script on a relevant topic for this creator.

Structure:
- Hook (5 sec): An observation or question that stops the scroll
- Development (25 sec): Explore the topic in the creator's voice
- Core Message (30 sec): The main point, delivered per the voice profile
- Close (10 sec): End in a way consistent with the creator's style (CTA, open question, etc. per their profile)

Add natural stage directions in brackets, e.g. [PAUSE], [SMILE], [LOOK AWAY].

Also include:
FILMING MOOD: (lighting, setting, energy)
B-ROLL IDEAS: 3 shots
MUSIC VIBE: specific mood"
    }
  ]
}

={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 1000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are a hook specialist for [CREATOR NAME] — see voice profile from the previous script.

Hook philosophy: [Describe what hooks should and shouldn't do for this creator — e.g. 'No clickbait, no shock tactics, should feel like a mirror for the viewer']

Based on the script provided, generate 5 hooks.

Each hook must:
- Be under 8 seconds when spoken aloud (max 20 words)
- Match the creator's voice profile
- Work for both YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels

Format:
HOOK 1 (Observation): [hook]
HOOK 2 (Question): [hook]
HOOK 3 (Contradiction): [hook]
HOOK 4 (Relatable Tension): [hook]
HOOK 5 (Poetic/Stylistic): [hook]

Then recommend the TOP HOOK and explain in one sentence why it best fits this creator's voice."
    }
  ]
}

parameters.subject: 🎬 Your Weekly Content Script is Ready! - {{ $now.format('DD MMM YYYY') }}
parameters.message:
=Hi! 👋

Your AI content team has been working hard this week. Here's everything you need to record this week's video:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📊 VIRAL TREND ANALYSIS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

{{ $('Agent 2 - Viral Content Analyst').item.json.content[0].text }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎬 YOUR SCRIPT THIS WEEK
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

{{ $('Agent 3 - Script Ghostwriter').item.json.content[0].text }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🪝 YOUR 5 HOOKS (pick your favourite!)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

{{ $('Agent 4 - Hook Generator').item.json.content[0].text }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Happy recording! You've got this 🌟

Your Content AI Team
